ab: rarasun min ni nanahi’ ni sinsi’ kira’.
ch: A:老師今天要帶你們去山上。
en: I will take you to the mountains today.

ab: payux putut nanahi’ ma ka yaya.
ch: B:媽媽說山上有很多蚊子。
en: Mom says that there are lots of mosquitoes in the mountains.

ab: rasun ta ni mumaṟah ni sinsi’ kira’.
ch: A:老師今天要帶你們去田裡。
en: I will take you to the fields.

ab: mamaha min tumabuṟ?
en: Are we going to loosen the soil?

ab: mamaha’ ta inu’ kira’?
en: Where are we going today?

ab: rarasun ta ni syaw na luling ni sinsi’.
en: Teacher will take us to the riverside.

ab: mamaha’ ta inu’ kira’?
en: Where are we going today?

ab: rarasun ta ni nanahi’ ni sinsi’.
en: Teacher will take us to the mountains today.

ab: mamaha’ ta syaw na luling kira’?
en: Are we going to the riverside today?

ab: aṟat, rarasun ta ni nanahi’ ni sinsi’.
ch: B:不是，老師要帶我們去山上。
en: No, our teacher is going to take us to the mountains.

ab: mamaha’ ta nanahi’ kira’?
en: Are we going to the mountains today?

ab: aṟat, mamaha ta mumaṟah kira’.
ch: B:不是，我們今天要去田裡。
en: No, we are going to the fields.

ab: amol halan ta matox syaw na luling sinsi’?
ch: A:老師，我們到河邊要看什麼?
en: Teacher, what are we going to see at the riverside?

ab: maha’ ta matox ci lalosan.
en: We are going to see dragonflies.

ab: amol halan ta matox nanahi’ sinsi’?
ch: A:老師，我們到山上要看什麼?
en: Teacher, what are we going to see in the mountains?

ab: mamaha’ ta matox ci ṟapiriy.
en: We are going to see butterflies.

ab: mamaha’ ta hunco’ mumaṟah aṟ?
en: What are we going to do in the fields?

ab: mamaha ta matox ci atiy pinmuhi’ ta mumaṟah, taxi’ haṟi’ ka mama’ laha’ ci banga’ kay.
ch: B:我們要到田裡看我們種的玉米，要小心有螞蟻、蜜蜂唷。
en: We are going to see the corn we grow in the fields, but you need to be aware of the ants and bees.

ab: mamaha’ ta lumanguy syaw na luling sinsi’?
ch: A:老師我們要到河邊游泳嗎?
en: Teacher, are we going to swim in		No, we are going to see dragonflies. the river?

ab: aṟat, maha’ ta matox ci lalosan.
en: No, we are going to see dragonflies.

ab: mamaha’ ta mamuhi’ ci ṟagu’ mumaṟah sinsi’?
ch: A:老師我們要到田裡種菜嗎?
en: Teacher, are we going to grow some vegetables in the fields?

ab: mamaha’ ta tumabul kira’.
en: We are going to loosen the soil today.

ab: cel mulaka’ saca kora’ ka lalosan.
en: There are dragonflies flying around.

ab: nanak soni’ mintox cu ci minyanux na lalosan kung.
ch: B:我今天才看過真正活著的蜻蜓。
en: Today is the first time I see real living dragonflies.

ab: cel mulaka’ saca kora’ ka ṟapiriy.
en: There are butterflies flying around.

ab: wa! talagay kinramasan taxan ka ṟapiriy, kisli’ mu caṟung.
ch: B:耶!哇!我喜歡蝴蝶，很漂亮。
en: Yeh! Wow! I love butterflies. They are very beautiful.

ab: cel mulaka’ saca kora’ ka ṟapiriy.
en: There are butterflies flying around.

ab: banga’ ka ca, aṟat ṟapiriy.
en: Those are not butterflies. They are bees.

ab: iya’ usa’ tuhya’ caṟung kay, katox sani tana’ la.
ch: A:在這裡看一看，不要到太遠的地方唷。
en: Come here and take a look. Don’t go too far!

ab: ho’, aṟat min maha’ tuhya’.
ch: B:好，我們不會去太遠的地方。
en: Got it, we won’t go anywhere too far.

ab: iya’ tatalang, kinhayuw maskakiy mayakuṟa’ mamu’.
ch: A:不要用跑的，慢慢走免得跌倒了。
en: Don’t run and walk slowly lest you fall down.

ab: mak ininah cu matox. ga.
en: I want to see them right away.
